name: The Links Golf and Sports Bar
about: The Links Golf and Sports Bar combines state-of-the-art golf simulation technology with a vibrant sports bar atmosphere. They feature TrackMan radar technology for tour-level data analysis, providing an experience for both golf enthusiasts and casual players. The venue offers a premium environment for year-round play, regardless of weather, with flexible booking options for groups and private events.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level TrackMan radar technology provides unparalleled accuracy
Year-round play in a climate-controlled environment
Premium golf, dining, and entertainment combined in one venue

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen service with pizza and dining options available
Full bar service with drinks available while playing

simulator_hardware.notes: Radar technology used by PGA Tour professionals

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The Links provides top-tier equipment, but you're welcome to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, The Links has its own kitchen and bar serving food and drinks to all guests.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Reservations are based on time, not holes - approximately 1 hour per person for 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Links welcomes families and has a casual atmosphere suitable for all ages.
